mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply(reply_no, space_key, task_no, writer_no, reply_content, image_no, created_at) VALUES (seq_reply_no.nextVal, #{space_key}, #{task_no}, #{writer_no}, #{reply_content}, #{image_no}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET reply_content = #{reply_content}, image_no = #{image_no} WHERE writer_no = #{writer_no} AND reply_no = #{reply_no}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reply WHERE reply_no = #{reply_no} AND writer_no = #{writer_no}
mapper.select: SELECT reply_no, writer_no, reply_content, image_no, created_at FROM reply WHERE space_key = #{space_key} AND task_no = #{task_no} ORDER BY created_at DESC
